center.name: 肯尼亚山
center.summary: 肯尼亚山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Olive ibis、非洲草鸮、Kikuyu white-eye，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in central Kenya, in the Aberdare Mountains and on Mount Kenya

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: akleyorum at Mt Kenya– it lacks the long crest found in adults | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | taxon = Bostrychia olivacea | authority = (Du Bus de Gisignies, 1838) | synonyms = | range_map = Oliveibisdistribution.png | range_map_caption = Current extant resident distribution according to the IUCN (2012) }} The olive ibis (Bostrychia olivacea) is a species of ibis native to dense tropical forests in central Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In east Africa it may also be found in dry grassland and at higher altitudes in Aberdares and on Mount Kenya. In southern Africa this species generally prefers marshes and vleis where there are patches of tall, rank grass and other vegetation but it may also be found in fynbos, renosterveld and acacia scrub close to water. The specific habitat requirements of the African grass owl characterize it as a habitat specialist.{{Cite journal|last1=Ansara-Ross|first1=T
